name: Mushroom Pita Pizza
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Fresh oregano, chopped OR 1/2 tsp Crushed dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a heavy skillet over medium heat, heat oil. Add onions and mushrooms; sauté for 5 minutes until the onion and mushrooms are tender.
3. Split pita bread in half horizontally. Place pita halves directly on oven rack and bake for 5 minutes or until lightly toasted.
4. Arrange tomato slices and basil leaves on bread. Scatter cooked onions and mushrooms over top.
5. Sprinkle with oregano and goat cheese. Bake 3 to 8 minutes or until begins to brown around edges.
6. Remove from oven and cut each pita half into 4 wedges.
Zucchini Variation:
1/2 cup Zucchini, thinly sliced
3 tbsp Parmesan Cheese
